vocab.example: What's your unique selling point compared to other tools?
vocab.example_vi: Điểm bán hàng độc đáo của bạn so với các công cụ khác là gì?

vocab.example: I like that you kept your pitch concise.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi thích cách bạn giữ bài pitch ngắn gọn.

vocab.example: Can I grab your attention for thirty seconds?
vocab.example_vi: Tôi có thể thu hút sự chú ý của bạn trong ba mươi giây không?

vocab.meaning_vi: đối tượng khách hàng mục tiêu
vocab.example: Our product is built for your target audience.
vocab.example_vi: Sản phẩm của chúng tôi được xây dựng cho đối tượng khách hàng mục tiêu của bạn.

vocab.example: In a nutshell, we help companies save time.
vocab.example_vi: Nói ngắn gọn thì, chúng tôi giúp các công ty tiết kiệm thời gian.

vocab.example: How do you stand out from your competitors?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn nổi bật thế nào so với đối thủ cạnh tranh?

vocab.meaning_vi: giải quyết một vấn đề khó khăn
vocab.example: Our app solves a pain point: manual tracking.
vocab.example_vi: Ứng dụng của chúng tôi giải quyết một vấn đề khó khăn: theo dõi thủ công.

vocab.example: My call to action is simple: book a demo.
vocab.example_vi: Lời kêu gọi hành động của tôi rất đơn giản: đặt lịch demo.

listening.title: An elevator pitch at a networking event

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: Hi, I don't think we've met yet. I'm Hoa from CloudTech Solutions.

lines.speaker: Duc (client)
lines.text: Nice to meet you, Hoa. I'm Duc, I work in operations at VinaLogistics.

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: Can I grab your attention for thirty seconds to explain what we do?

lines.speaker: Duc (client)
lines.text: Sure, go ahead. I have a few minutes before my next meeting.

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: In a nutshell, we help logistics companies solve a pain point: manual tracking.

lines.speaker: Duc (client)
lines.text: That sounds interesting. What's your unique selling point compared to other tools?

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: Our dashboard is simple and fast, and it's built for your target audience.

lines.speaker: Duc (client)
lines.text: I like that you kept it concise. How do you stand out from competitors?

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: We focus only on logistics, so we understand your workflow better than anyone.

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: Here's my card. My call to action is simple: let's book a 15-minute demo.

lines.speaker: Duc (client)
lines.text: That's a strong pitch. Let's set something up next week.

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: Great, I'll follow up by email tomorrow to find a convenient time.

questions.q: What does Hoa ask for at the start of her pitch?
What problem does CloudTech's product solve?
What is Hoa's call to action?

shadowing: Can I grab your attention for thirty seconds to explain what we do?
In a nutshell, we help companies solve their biggest daily pain points.
What makes your product stand out from all the competitors in this market?
Our pitch needs to be short, clear, and easy for the target audience to understand.
Let's end with a clear call to action so people know the next step.
